title: M22-4, Part II, Chapter 3, Section E – Benefits Manager Entitlement and Kickers
description: This part discusses how non-chapter 33 education benefits, Montgomery GI Bill (MGIB or chapter 30), Montgomery GI Bill - Selected Reserve (chapter 1606), and Survivors' and Dependents' Educational Assistance (DEA or chapter 35) are processed in Benefits Manager (BM).
keywords: DGIB Managed Service, BM, Benefits Manager, BDN
